headline: Federal Circuit Overturns GM's Patent Win Against Auto-Parts Provider LKQ
summary: General Motors Co. (NYSE: GM) faced a significant setback as the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Federal Circuit overturned a prior ruling in its favor against LKQ Corp. (NASDAQ: LKQ) over fender design patents. This decision marks a major shift in design-patent law, discarding a long-standing test for determining patent validity and remanding the case to the U.S. Patent Office for further review.

summary: Microsoft and AI company G42 announced a $1 billion investment to transform Kenya's digital landscape. This initiative, in partnership with Kenya's Ministry of Information, aims to establish a state-of-the-art green data center powered by renewable geothermal energy in Olkaria. The project will enhance digital skills training, boost cloud adoption, and improve connectivity, positioning Kenya as a digital leader in East Africa.
